summary: Lead integration gate accepts M7-MAP-SITUATION-MODE-UX-001 after systems_architect ACCEPT and full local integration verification. The branch changes the default player-facing map to Situation/??, presents deterministic non-rectangular soft strategic regions, de-noises route overlays in situation mode while retaining full routes mode, adds localized map semantics and recommendation presentation, and keeps debug/grid presentation out of player mode. Formal closure is still pending PR CI, merge, main sync, and CLOSED status update.
